excerpt: A shaolin monk fights to escape a labyrinthine underground prison ruled by a monstrous former general with near-supernatural powers.
title: Burning Paradise

excerpt: An assassin hired to kill a beloved clan leader discovers loyalty is both fleeting and eternal.
title: Killer Clans

excerpt: A young policewoman becomes possessed by a malevolent spirit and dispatches anyone who crosses her.
title: Hell Has No Boundary

excerpt: Travelers stranded at a remote sanatorium fall prey to a reincarnated Count Dracula seeking a virgin to fall in love with him to fulfill a prophecy and resurrect his daughter.
title: Count Dracula's Great Love

excerpt: A renowned artist encounters his dead wife’s doppelgänger and finds he can only create by painting with the blood of murder victims.
title: Blood Delirium
